authorization.decision: Owner selected option 2: keep Governance private and provision a repository-scoped read-only Deploy Key
authorization.scope: RMD-06 cloud execution prerequisite only: dependency authentication, workflow syntax repair and fail-closed fork handling; production remains blocked

precedence: machine/contracts/task_graph.json defines formal task completion only
machine/status/latest.json is the sole current cross-dimensional delivery status
evidence/tasks and machine/stages are source records, not overall status authorities
machine/facts and the seven human documents are deterministic derivatives

dimensions.evidence_integrity: Schema, path, task, stage-local acceptance, final Acceptance and prohibition bindings validate.
dimensions.mechanism_implementation: Local or synthetic mechanism evidence exists; this does not satisfy a protected Oracle.
dimensions.formal_task_completion: Only the frozen task_graph status and its final Acceptance pass gate control this dimension.
dimensions.protected_oracles: Only protected observations with valid provenance can change NOT_RUN.
dimensions.final_acceptance: Only the exact 34 Acceptance Oracles can pass this dimension.
dimensions.production_readiness: Requires all formal tasks, protected Oracles and final Acceptance gates; local evidence cannot promote it.
dimensions.publication: Remains LOCAL_ONLY_NOT_PUBLISHED until the owner-ordered final clean snapshot publication.

PRE_CLOSURE.next_action: Finalize RMD-05 assurance provenance; keep protected Oracles, production execution and publication blocked.

DEPENDENCY_AUTH_READY.next_action: Execute the RMD-06 protected cloud preflight with dependency authentication; keep production execution and final publication blocked.
